statement: In every magma, Equation 3013 (`x = ((y * (z * z)) * y) * z`) implies Equation 1094 (`x = y * ((x * (z * x)) * z)`).
lean_statement:
theorem problem_normal_0559
    {G : Type*} (op : G → G → G)
    (h : ∀ x y z : G, x = (op (op (op y (op z z)) y) z)) :
    ∀ x y z : G, x = (op y (op (op x (op z x)) z))
